source: Consolidated from agent bottlenecks, DX/build, pre-commit, and gitignore reports. Deduplicated against x-platform-repo-hygiene-tickets.json and devex-completed-tickets.json.

tickets.title: [X Platform] Agent & DX improvements backlog
tickets.description:
## Summary
Parent ticket for agent-friendliness, multi-agent workflow, DevEx, build system, pre-commit, and gitignore improvements identified in repo audits.

## Source reports
- Agent & multi-agent bottlenecks
- DevEx & build system
- Pre-commit & local gates
- .gitignore review

## Run
Use Linear MCP with this payload.

tickets.title: [X Platform][major] Fix CI path bugs in .github/workflows
tickets.description:
## Problem
CI workflows use wrong paths for omnichannel, causing npm cache and Go setup to fail or use wrong files.

## Evidence
- `omnichannel/frontend/package-lock.json` → should be `services/omnichannel/frontend/package-lock.json`
- `omnichannel/backend/go.mod` → should be `services/omnichannel/backend/go.mod`

## Affected files
- .github/workflows/ci.yml
- .github/workflows/deploy-preflight.yml

## Validation
- Run workflows and verify cache paths resolve correctly.

## Category
major (blocks CI reliability)

tickets.title: [X Platform][major] Add omnichannel frontend to verify_apps
tickets.description:
## Problem
`scripts/verify apps` only runs `apps/cloud-console` build. Omnichannel frontend can regress without CI catching it.

## Scope
- Add `services/omnichannel/frontend` build to `verify_apps` in scripts/verify.
- Ensure both web apps are validated in `verify all`.

## Affected files
- scripts/verify

## Validation
- `./scripts/verify apps` runs both cloud-console and omnichannel frontend builds.

## Category
major

tickets.title: [X Platform][major] Add pre-commit hooks
tickets.description:
## Problem
No pre-commit hooks exist. Agents and humans can commit generated artifacts, non-Conventional Commits, and from wrong repo root (nested omnichannel/frontend).

## Scope
- Add pre-commit framework (pre-commit, Husky, or lefthook).
- Block staged paths matching generated artifacts (node_modules, .next, target, bin/, api, worker).
- Enforce Conventional Commits on commit-msg.
- Add nested-repo guard: fail if `git rev-parse --show-toplevel` is `services/omnichannel/frontend`.

## Affected files
- New: .pre-commit-config.yaml or .husky/ or lefthook.yml
- package.json (optional prepare script)

## Validation
- Attempt to commit generated file → blocked.
- Attempt commit with invalid message → blocked.
- Commit from omnichannel/frontend root → blocked.

## Category
major

tickets.title: [X Platform][medium] Make Linear MCP optional when team unavailable
tickets.description:
## Problem
AGENTS.md requires Linear ticket before every change. When Linear MCP team is unavailable, agents must stop. Blocks all autonomous work.

## Scope
- Update AGENTS.md: when Linear MCP returns "Entity not found: Team", proceed with documented workaround (skip ticket creation, document in plan).
- Add "Linear unavailable" workflow.

## Affected files
- AGENTS.md

## Validation
- Agent can make progress when Linear MCP returns "Entity not found: Team".

## Category
medium

tickets.title: [X Platform][medium] Add machine-readable project manifest
tickets.description:
## Problem
No single source of truth for projects, paths, and build commands. platform.projects.json, scripts/verify, Makefile, and package.json workspaces all hardcode paths. Adding a project requires editing multiple scripts.

## Scope
- Derive build/verify targets from platform.projects.json or a manifest.
- Add `scope` / `affected_paths` to ExecPlans so agents can determine work overlap.

## Affected files
- scripts/verify, scripts/deploy-preflight, Makefile
- PLANS.md (plan schema for scope)

## Validation
- New project added to manifest → verify picks it up automatically.

## Category
medium

tickets.title: [X Platform][medium] Single stack entry point and deprecate alternatives
tickets.description:
## Problem
Three stack entry points: `./platform`, `scripts/dev-stack`, `services/omnichannel/scripts/stack.sh`. Different semantics, unclear when to use which. Multi-agent workflows get inconsistent status.

## Scope
- Document `./platform` as the single default. Deprecate or clearly subordinate alternatives.
- Add decision tree to docs/runbooks/platform-cli-workflow.md.

## Affected files
- docs/runbooks/platform-cli-workflow.md
- AGENTS.md
- scripts/README.md

## Validation
- New contributor can determine which command to use from docs.

## Category
medium

tickets.title: [X Platform][medium] Pin Mintlify CLI for docs
tickets.description:
## Problem
`npx mint` in verify_docs and docs:dev uses latest Mintlify. Docs builds can drift over time. docs/infra-dx-blindspots.md flags this as P1.

## Scope
- Add docs/mintlify/package.json with pinned Mintlify CLI version.
- Update scripts to use `npm run` from docs/mintlify instead of `npx mint`.

## Affected files
- docs/mintlify/package.json (new or update)
- scripts/verify
- package.json docs:dev script

## Validation
- pinned docs verification command uses the targeted Mintlify version.

## Category
medium

tickets.title: [X Platform][minor] Add plan dependency graph (depends_on)
tickets.description:
## Problem
Plans don't declare dependencies. Agents can't infer safe parallelization or ordering. Overlap only discoverable by reading plans.

## Scope
- Add `depends_on: [plan-id]` to ExecPlan schema in PLANS.md.
- Update plans with dependency declarations where applicable.

## Affected files
- PLANS.md
- plans/*.md

## Validation
- Agent can determine which plans block others.

## Category
minor

tickets.title: [X Platform][minor] Add .cursor/rules with shell and convention gotchas
tickets.description:
## Problem
Shell gotchas (quoting, [domain] globbing, backticks) and conventions live only in docs/agent-mistakes.md. New agents don't get them unless they read the log. No file-level rules.

## Scope
- Add .cursor/rules or RULE.md with shell-safe patterns and convention rules.
- Extract key gotchas from agent-mistakes.md into discoverable rules.

## Affected files
- .cursor/rules/*.mdc or RULE.md

## Validation
- Agent receives rules in context when editing.

## Category
minor

tickets.title: [X Platform][minor] Resolve nested git repo in omnichannel/frontend
tickets.description:
## Problem
`services/omnichannel/frontend` is a separate git repo. Agents commit to wrong root. Multi-agent workflows diverge. Root .gitignore doesn't apply there.

## Scope
- Option A: Remove nested .git, make frontend part of monorepo.
- Option B: Convert to git submodule with clear docs.
- Document current state and add pre-commit guard (see separate ticket) as mitigation.

## Affected files
- services/omnichannel/frontend/.git (if removing)
- docs/repo-structure.md
- AGENTS.md

## Validation
- Single git root for monorepo, or clear submodule workflow.

## Category
minor
